creator: twm@pdp11.pw
text:
Created attachment 208596
svn diff to update net-im/prosody to 0.11.3

About a month ago Prosoy 0.11.3 was released, containing numerous bugfixes. It is recommended for all users of 0.11.x to upgrade.

Updating the port shouldn't require more than bumping PORTVERSION and resetting PORTREVISION, see attached diff - tested with poudriere.
